ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was uploaded */,
  "last_analyzed_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was last analyzed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file within the repository */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., Java, XML) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file contents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "file_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit that changed the file */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of the class (e.g., Interface, Enum) */,
  "extends_class" TEXT /* Name of the class that this class extends */,
  "implements_interfaces" TEXT /* Names of the interfaces that this class implements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method (e.g., Constructor, Static) */,
  "method_params" TEXT /* Parameters of the method */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CC, HC, MI) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "dependent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent class */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency (e.g., import, extend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inheritance" (
  "inheritance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance relationship */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class */,
  "inheritance_type" TEXT /* Type of the inheritance relationship (e.g., extend, implement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inheritance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inheritance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inheritance_parent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Manager, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_repo_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_repo_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_repo_access_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
